message:
Bulk fixes: string comparison, stdlib skip, global vars

- operators.zig: Handle string == comparison when one side is .unknown
- resolution.zig: Add subprocess/tempfile/typing/os to builtin skip list
- compile.zig: Skip builtin modules in pre-compile loop
- analyzer.zig: Treat top-level assignments as module-level variables

Eliminates 3 classes of common errors.
